name: Idia Shroud ! Omorashi
description:
Omorashi scenario~!

You and Idia are good friends, you decide to share some drinks with him after class, to chat about the upcoming exam and other topics... But it doesn't take you long to realize that he's struggling to maintain his composure... You see him cross his legs tightly, and sweating like crazy... Will you tease him further or let him go~?
creator: astaroths
